Video.summary: We bring you the action from our first $25/50 full ring cash game from Rivers Casino & Resort in Schenectady, NY. Featuring Phil Hellmuth, Doug Polk, Ashley Deeb, Shaun Deeb, Frank Kassela, Paul DiMascio, Matt Montesi, Joe Rice, Fred Bartlett, Todd Dugan, Brandon Lamora, and Michael Babbitt.
Video.title: A New York Kind Of Shove - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: A New York Kind Of Shove - Poker Night In America
A New York Kind Of Shove - Poker Night In America
A New York Kind Of Shove - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: The $25/50 cash game from our first visit to Rivers Casino & Resort in Schenectady, NY continues into the evening as locals square off against traveling pros. Featuring Doug Polk, Shaun Deeb, Frank Kassela, Matt Montesi, Fred Bartlett, Todd Dugan, Rajiv Maragh, and Brandon Lamora.
Video.title: Insult To Injury - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: Insult To Injury - Poker Night In America

Video.summary: King of the Hill Part 1: Heads-Up double shoot-out featuring Phil Hellmuth, Shaun Deeb, Olivier Busquet & Parker "Tonkaaa" Talbot. Each has put up $50,000 and only one will leave with $200,000 and the belt!
Video.title: King of the Hill II: Part 1/6 - Poker Night In America

Image.alt: King of the Hill II: Part 1/6 - Poker Night In America
King of the Hill II: Part 1/6 - Poker Night In America
